title: opithandra pumila
intro: Opithandra pumila, also known as the Himalayan opithandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, Opithandra pumila is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in various forms of traditional medicine.
